entries.reason: Response contains decisional or authorizative fields from Level B.
entries.release_condition: manual intake review and sanitized response
entries.notes: Prevents decisional leakage from Level B.

entries.reason: Response lacks required trace_id, audit or shadow completeness.
entries.notes: Traceability gaps require quarantine before methodological consumption.

entries.reason: Response misses required documentary packet nuclei.
entries.release_condition: documentary packet completed or downgraded under review
entries.notes: Incomplete documentary packet cannot enter sensitive flows.

entries.reason: Response suggests closure, certification or completion of M07.
entries.release_condition: boundary violation removed and manual review completed

entries.reason: Response suggests approval, final authorization or signature readiness.
entries.notes: Final authorization remains in Level A with human approval.

entries.reason: Critical blocks remain open or unpropagated in intake response.
entries.release_condition: critical block handling under Level A governance
entries.notes: Critical blocks prevent direct downstream consumption.
